summary:
I am a Frontend Web Developer with over 5 years of experience specializing in Angular and Enterprise Applications, with a total of more than 22 years in the Software Development world.

Throughout my career, I have made two significant technological shifts: from COBOL to modern Web Development, and from Angular to the latest Frontend technologies.

Both demonstrate my adaptability, continuous learning, and commitment to technical excellence.

I have experience in banking, insurance, public administration, and the Utilities sector, but I am also open to opportunities in other sectors.
